summary: Product-Focused Full-Stack Engineer with 6+ years of experience building high-performance, user-facing products in high-ownership startup environments. Expert in React, TypeScript, and Node.js, with a track record of leading development from complex backend architecture to polished UI/UX. Proven ability to thrive in fully remote, async teams, turning vague product concepts into stable, engaging features for diverse user bases.

highlights: Redesigned an acquired DEX aggregator by introducing a reader/writer architecture with Redis, bringing infrastructure costs down from an estimated $30–40K/month to about $3K/month within 2 weeks.
Iterated on Smart Order Routing across 5 versions, reducing P95 latency from 1.2s to 250ms and improving win rate against a leading competitor from 17% to over 60%.
Integrated new AMM partners end-to-end, covering SDKs, APIs, and UI integration.
Worked on the Bluefin Spot UI redesign using React and TypeScript.
Contributed to a new project on Canton Network, building APIs to surface market maker quotes and enabling secure fund transfers.
Created a Gmail simulation for browser-based AI agents, enabling the testing of email workflows such as reading threads, and sending emails in a controlled environment.
Built a Playground page showcasing available simulated platforms (e.g., Gmail, Apollo, LinkedIn) so clients could preview the environments the AI agent would interact with.
Created a centralized data warehouse to provide consistent datasets across simulated platforms (e.g., Gmail, LinkedIn, Apollo).
Built Foundry's client-facing annotation platform from scratch, enabling creation, assignment, and execution of complex browser-based tasks.
Developed evaluation and reviewer pages where clients could watch execution recordings and assess results against organization-specific criteria.
Developed and shipped an AI-driven candidate screening system using React-based workflows, improving engagement by 25% in top-of-funnel acquisition.
Spearheaded the development of an AI-powered job description generator, leading to an additional $4,000 in annual revenue through white-labeling.
Contributed to the product side of Qureos, collaborating with the customer success team to prioritize and implement client requests, and converting 3 clients to pay for quarterly subscriptions.
Integrated Stripe to securely store multiple payment methods, processing over 50 transactions per month.
Mentored high school students in USACO with a focus on algorithms and competitive problem solving.
Helped two students progress from Bronze to Gold level through weekly sessions and personalized guidance.
Co-founded a bootstrapped software studio, successfully setting up the entire engineering workflow.
Led and mentored a team of 4 developers, driving sprint execution, task delegation, and maintaining code quality.
Owned the core technical architecture, designing full-stack web applications for all incoming projects.
Managed product scoping and technical client communication to ensure iterative feature delivery.
Contributed as one of the first engineers on a client project, shaping core features and establishing early trust.
Handled an average of 5 major features per month, with less than 10% issues found enabling faster development to production release cycle.
Developed responsive web pages using TailwindCSS, enhancing cross-device user experience.
Built and deployed a "For You" job recommendation algorithm, achieving a 7% CTR over 8 months.
Integrated reCAPTCHA v3, reducing spam by 72% on public endpoints.
Built a React-based admin portal for talent operations, enabling efficient CV reviews and reducing hiring process time by 60%.
Developed complex D3 charts and custom SVG solutions, enhancing data visualization capabilities.
Designed and built a short-term drone simulator using Three.js and Vue.js, incorporating mathematical models to educate children in programming.

projects.name: Wave.tickets
highlights: Developed an AI-powered SMS ticket booking system using NestJS, OpenAI, and LangChain, allowing users to book tickets seamlessly through text messages.
Deployed the Wave.tickets AI server on AWS using command-line tools, handling infra setup end-to-end.

projects.name: Ant Colony Optimization
highlights: Developed a 3D visualization of the Ant Colony Optimization algorithm on a 2D plane using Three.js.
Simulated real-time ant movement and pheromone trails to demonstrate algorithm dynamics.

education_and_certificates.credential: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
